feedback.text: We need protection from payment processors and banks to not censor things we can buy online, for example video games and digital goods. Illegal content is generally forbidden, but payment processors and banks should not have say if I want to buy digital goods that they dont like. As example you can look whats happening with steam, Mastercard, visa and PayPal censoring content by threatening to not process payments anymore, because they dont like what people want to play, even if its not illegal.
